topic: There is a light switch in my house that controls nothing and last week it started getting warm
title: There Is a Light Switch in My House That Controls Nothing. Last Week It Started Getting Warm. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There is a light switch in my hallway that controls nothing. Last week it started getting warm to the touch.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a single old light switch on a hallway wall, the plate faintly worn, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Old house. One switch by the stairs wired to nothing, the inspector said.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an old house staircase and hallway, a light switch by the stairs, dim warm light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a finger near an old wall light switch, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One night I touched it. The plate was warm. Like a body had leaned on it.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand touching a warm light switch plate, faint heat shimmer, dim hallway light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a light switch flipped to the on position, dim hallway, no light change, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Nothing in the house lit. But somewhere below, a faint hum started.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a dim house interior at night, all lights off, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I followed the wire into the wall.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an electrical wire traced along a baseboard into a wall, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It ran down, behind the basement, to a room not on the plans.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a dim basement with an old wall, a faint outline of a sealed room, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each night the switch is hotter. When it is on, footsteps pace the hidden room.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a glowing warm light switch plate at night, dim hallway, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night I left it off. Something knocked from inside the wall, asking me to turn it on.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a blank basement wall at night, faint dust falling as if knocked, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I taped the switch down in the off position.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a light switch taped down in the off position, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning it was on. The tape was melted. The hidden room is quiet now. Waiting.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a light switch flipped on with melted tape hanging from it, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
